failure_modes.text: Dialectical reasoning fails when teams mistake endless contrarianism for real synthesis work.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when teams confuse productive dialectic with endless contrarianism and never translate tension into a bounded decision or next step.
failure_modes.mitigation: Require synthesis: every dialectical round must produce a concrete integration, not just another contrary view; contrarianism without synthesis is waste.

failure_modes.text: The model can slide into analysis paralysis when every perspective is surfaced but none is integrated into action.
failure_modes.mitigation: Set a decision deadline that forces perspectives into a synthesized recommendation; surfacing alternatives without integrating them is analysis paralysis.

failure_modes.text: Dialectic can be emotionally avoided when the team resists confronting the weaknesses in its own position.
failure_modes.mitigation: Create psychological safety for confronting weaknesses in the team's own position; dialectic fails when the antithesis is emotionally avoided.

premortem_questions.text: What is the strongest antithesis to our current thesis?
What decision or next step should this tension produce instead of just extending debate?
premortem_questions.source_quote: translate tension into a bounded decision or next step

premortem_questions.text: Which weakness in our own reasoning are we emotionally resisting because it threatens the current story?

heuristics.text: Use thesis, antithesis, and synthesis as a default reasoning norm for important claims.
Force the team to articulate the strongest counterposition before it earns synthesis.
heuristics.source_quote: Every proposition must automatically generate its counter-proposition

heuristics.text: Translate contradiction into a bounded integration step so dialectic ends in better judgment rather than endless motion.

curation_notes.summary: The source is naturally chunk-ready on thesis-antithesis-synthesis discipline, anti-contrarianism, and anti-paralysis synthesis work.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor discussion-culture sprawl because the raw source is stronger on operational dialectic and bounded synthesis.
open_questions: The second premortem item compresses several source warnings on endless debate so the chunk stays decision-oriented.

allies: The raw ally surface is strongest on critical-thinking, systems-thinking, step-back, and feynman-technique as later relation material.
antagonists: The raw antagonist pressure is strongest on confirmation-bias and one-sided frame protection, but only clean current-vocabulary ids should survive Wave 3.
structured_tensions: The source is tension-real around contradiction avoidance, but it does not expose a cleaner explicit current-vocabulary tension block than the one-hop relation surface.
